{{Quote|Back away, Portha. Your clumsiness will be reported!|Wedge Antilles|<ref name="WG" />}}
'''Portha''' was a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] that lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[Alien Protection Zone/Legends|Invisec]] during [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron's]] operation there in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]. Portha assisted the Rogues during their attempt to bring down the planetary shield, though was unable to participate in [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|the final battle]] after being struck down with the [[Krytos virus]].<ref name="WG" />

Following the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|liberation]] of Coruscant, he was cured of the virus and made a member of the squadron, serving them in a previously nonexistent security capacity as a reward for his contributions.<ref name="KT" />
